subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God who is attracted to Him! Your letter, both in verse and prose, was received and its perusal brought joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المنجذبه مکتوب منظوم و منثور وارد شد و از ملاحظه اش حبور و سرور روی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the power of words; of speech, @knowledge; recognition of God
